## Summary

## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change locally.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Database migrations added if schema changed (`npm run db:generate`)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
